title: Struct members are not truncated to their width properly

features.name: struct member assignment from sliced register
features.description: Code should include a struct with a logic field where the field is assigned from a slice of a wider register

features.name: struct assignment with ternary and sized literal
features.description: Code should include a struct assignment where a ternary expression with a sized literal (like 5'b0) is used to assign to a narrow struct field
